### 2194774
**Care Bears: Unlock the Magic S01E24 - Snow-verload**  
🆕 TV-Y7 🔒 21:12  
⌛ November 11, 2026 at 23:59:00 EST  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=1000000000093702&titleid=2194774&mediaid=c5f7296eff4f36bf1638691cb56b446f4f38b049) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/care-bears-unlock-the-magic/snow-verload-episode.html  
seriesid=`2141109` titleid=`2194774` mediaid=`c5f7296eff4f36bf1638691cb56b446f4f38b049`  
_The Bears investigate the mysterious transformation of a tropical valley into a winter wonderland of snow. To return it to its natural state, Funshine must follow Dibble's example and give up something he wanted for himself, just as Bluster and his bad crowd invade Care-A-Lot! They're determined to steal the Care-O-Meter and stop the Care Bears' mission of caring and sharing. To foil his plan, the Bears must rely on an unlikely ally._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2194774_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2194774_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2194774_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2194774_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2194774_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2194774_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2194774_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2194774_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2194774_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2194774_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2194774_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2194774_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2194774_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2194774_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2194774_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2194774_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2194774_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2194774_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2194774_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2194774_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
